title: TensorRT-LLM on Blackwell with FP8 and NVFP4

questions.question: Roughly what is the per-million-tokens cost gap the lesson reports between Blackwell + TRT-LLM + Dynamo and H100 + vLLM on a comparable 120B-class workload?
questions.question_zh: 在可比的 120B 级别工作负载下，本课报告 Blackwell + TRT-LLM + Dynamo 与 H100 + vLLM 之间每百万 token 的成本大致差多少？
options: About 100x
About 7x
About 2x
About 1.1x
options_zh: 约 100 倍
约 7 倍
约 2 倍
约 1.1 倍

questions.question: Why does the lesson recommend keeping KV cache in FP8 rather than NVFP4 on Blackwell?
questions.question_zh: 本课为什么建议在 Blackwell 上把 KV cache 保留为 FP8 而非 NVFP4？
options: NVFP4 KV cache is not yet supported in any engine
FP8 is the only precision NVLink 5 supports
KV cache spans a wide dynamic range; FP4 quantization causes catastrophic accuracy loss in attention scores
FP8 uses less memory than FP4
options_zh: 目前没有任何引擎支持 NVFP4 的 KV cache
NVLink 5 只支持 FP8 这种精度
KV cache 的动态范围很宽；FP4 量化会让 attention 分数出现灾难性的精度损失
FP8 比 FP4 更省显存

questions.question: Which Blackwell feature does TRT-LLM exploit so models can be loaded without a post-training conversion step?
questions.question_zh: TRT-LLM 利用了 Blackwell 的哪一项特性，使得模型无需后训练转换即可加载？
options: Day-0 FP4 weights shipped by model providers
INT2 weights via bitsandbytes
FP64 attention
BF16 KV cache
options_zh: 模型提供方在 Day 0 就发布的 FP4 权重
通过 bitsandbytes 提供的 INT2 权重
FP64 attention
BF16 KV cache

questions.question: What is the dominant tradeoff of choosing the TRT-LLM stack per the lesson?
questions.question_zh: 本课认为选择 TRT-LLM 技术栈最主要的代价是什么？
options: It cannot serve MoE models
It requires fully autonomous remediation
It locks you into NVIDIA hardware — no AMD, no Intel, no ARM
It only works at small scale
options_zh: 无法服务 MoE 模型
需要完全自主的修复机制
把你锁定在 NVIDIA 硬件上 — 没有 AMD、Intel、ARM
只能在小规模下工作

questions.question: Which precision combination does the lesson describe as the typical Blackwell config?
questions.question_zh: 本课描述的 Blackwell 典型精度组合是什么？
options: Weights FP4, KV cache FP4, attention in INT8
Everything in BF16
Weights NVFP4, activations NVFP4, KV cache FP8, attention accumulator FP32
Weights INT8, activations FP32, KV cache INT4
options_zh: 权重 FP4，KV cache FP4，attention 用 INT8
全部使用 BF16
权重 NVFP4，激活 NVFP4，KV cache FP8，attention 累加器 FP32
权重 INT8，激活 FP32，KV cache INT4

questions.question: For reasoning-heavy workloads where NVFP4 weight conversion drops MATH accuracy a few points, what does the lesson advise?
questions.question_zh: 对于推理密集型工作负载，NVFP4 权重转换会让 MATH 准确率掉几个点，本课建议怎么做？
options: Switch to AMD MI300X
Disable speculative decoding
Validate task quality on your eval set per model; teams often use FP8 weights + FP4 activations or stay on H200 with FP8 throughout
Ship NVFP4 anyway because the cost win dominates
options_zh: 切换到 AMD MI300X
禁用 speculative decoding
针对每个模型在自己的 eval 集上验证任务质量；很多团队会改用 FP8 权重 + FP4 激活，或者干脆留在 H200 上全程 FP8
管它呢，反正成本优势压倒一切，照样上 NVFP4
